metadata.description:
CSS 布局: Flexbox for one-dimensional layout / Grid for two-dimensional layout. Media queries for responsive design. Here are the corresponding technical terms and examples in Python (assuming you want to provide an example of using media queries with a simple web framework like Flask): For Flexbox: ```python # Example of setting up flexbox in CSS via a Flask route from flask import Flask, render_template_string app = Flask(__name__) @app.route('/') def home(): return render_template_string('''
Item 1
Item 2
Item 3
''') if __name__ == '__main__': app.run(debug=True) ``` For Grid: ```python # Example of setting up grid in CSS via a Flask route from flask import Flask, render_template_string app = Flask(__name__) @app.route('/') def home(): return render_template_string('''
Item 1
Item 2
Item 3
''') if __name__ == '__main__': app.run(debug=True) ``` For Media Queries: ```python # Example of using media queries in CSS via a Flask route from flask import Flask, render_template_string app = Flask(__name__) @app.route('/') def home(): return render_template_string('''
Item 1
Item 2
Item 3
''') if __name__ == '__main__': app.run(debug=True) ``` These examples demonstrate how to use Flexbox and Grid layouts, as well as media queries, in a simple web application using Flask.
